details.productUrlName: Rally the Galadhrim Borderless Surge Foil

customAttributes.description:
Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control.
Conspire (As you cast this spell, you may tap two untapped creatures you control that share a color with it. When you do, copy it and you may choose a new target for the copy.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
